intro:
There is no information available on the plant "Tragacantha hornii". However, I can provide information on the plant "Tragacanth", which is a type of dried sap obtained from the genus Astragalus. 

Tragacanth is a natural adhesive derived from the sap of certain Astragalus species, commonly used as a thickening agent in food and cosmetics. The health benefits of tragacanth include its ability to support digestive health, soothe irritated skin, and act as an emollient. The bioactive constituents of tragacanth include mucilages, glycosides, and flavonoids. 

The most common herbal preparations made with tragacanth include topical creams and ointments for skin irritations, as well as oral supplements for digestive issues.
